cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out who Bob is dancing with at the end of the dance. So there are these five dancers: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each of them starts with a partner: Alice with Lola, Bob with Karl, Claire with Patrick, Dave with Sam, and Eve with Helga. First, I need to track the partner changes step by step. Let me list out the initial pairings and then each swap. Starting point: - Alice: Lola - Bob: Karl - Claire: Patrick - Dave: Sam - Eve: Helga Now, the first switch is Dave and Alice switching partners. So initially, Dave is with Sam and Alice is with Lola. After they switch, Dave will be with Lola and Alice will be with Sam. Let me update the list: After first switch (Dave and Alice): - Alice: Sam - Dave: Lola - Others remain the same: - Bob: Karl - Claire: Patrick - Eve: Helga Then the second switch is Eve and Alice switching partners. So Eve is currently with Helga and Alice is with Sam. Switching them would mean Eve is now with Sam and Alice is with Helga. Updating the list: After second switch (Eve and Alice): - Alice: Helga - Eve: Sam - Others: - Bob: Karl - Claire: Patrick - Dave: Lola Third switch: Bob and Dave switch partners. Bob is with Karl, Dave is with Lola. After switching, Bob will be with Lola and Dave will be with Karl. Updating: After third switch (Bob and Dave): - Bob: Lola - Dave: Karl - Others: - Alice: Helga - Claire: Patrick - Eve: Sam Fourth switch: Bob and Eve switch partners. Currently, Bob is with Lola and Eve is with Sam. After switching, Bob will be with Sam and Eve will be with Lola. Updating: After fourth switch (Bob and Eve): - Bob: Sam - Eve: Lola - Others: - Alice: Helga - Claire: Patrick - Dave: Karl Fifth switch: Bob and Claire switch partners. Bob is
